bundle.longDescription: WhatsApp Web Desktop Application with badge support

security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: data: https://static.whatsapp.net https://*.whatsapp.net https://*.facebook.com https://*.fbcdn.net https://www.googletagmanager.com https://maps.googleapis.com https://maps.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob: https://static.whatsapp.net https://*.whatsapp.net https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://* https://*.whatsapp.net https://*.facebook.com https://*.fbcdn.net; connect-src 'self' https://*.whatsapp.net https://*.facebook.com https://*.fbcdn.net https://dit.whatsapp.net https://api.whatsapp.com wss://*.whatsapp.net;
